financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company did really well by making smart investments and keeping costs low.
They are focused on growing over time and making sure investors get good returns.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is doing a good job managing risks, but global economic challenges like inflation and high interest rates could slow down business.
They face threats like cyber attacks and trade issues, but have strong protections in place to handle these risks.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing a great job taking care of the environment.
They also have strong leadership and treat people fairly.

capital_structure.title: Capital Structure
capital_structure.label: Well Managed
bullets: The company is good at managing its debts, which means it can easily pay what it owes.
They have a strong plan to use their money wisely, keeping some for growth and giving some back to investors.

management_discussion.title: Management Discussion
management_discussion.label: Good
bullets: The company clearly explains its goals and how it's doing in the market, making it easy to understand their plans and challenges.
They are focused on growing their business and staying innovative, even though profits are a bit lower than last year.

strategy.title: Strategy Overview
strategy.label: Excellent
bullets: Tech Mahindra has a clear plan to grow quickly by focusing on new services and expanding into different regions.
While the strategy is strong, outside economic factors could affect how much money the company makes.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: Tech Mahindra is expected to grow well because it's focusing on areas and industries with lots of potential.
The company plans to share a big part of its profits with investors, showing they care about rewarding them.
